caption:
@mirrorintheskycashmere was born from a journey — a mother and son, the mountains of Nepal, and a quiet realisation that true luxury is not loud. Since 2014, every piece has been handcrafted in family-run workshops in Kathmandu, wrapped in the finest Mongolian and Himalayan cashmere, coloured with natural dyes, and made to order — because nothing here is made in a hurry.

But perhaps the most beautiful detail is this: sewn into every garment, invisible to the eye, is the Kalachakra — a sacred Tibetan amulet that creates an unseen thread between the hands that made it and the soul that wears it. You may not see it. You will feel it.

These are not pieces for a season. They are pieces for a lifetime — and maybe beyond.

New arrivals now in store at Blink Ibiza & Formentera.

Cashmere: @mirrorintheskycashmere
